name: soapysdr0.8-module-plutosdr
title: soapysdr0.8-module-plutosdr
summary: Pluto SDR device support for SoapySDR
description:
Pluto SDR device support for SoapySDR
The Soapy Pluto SDR project provides a SoapySDR hardware support module.
Using this, any program using SoapySDR to interface to software
defined radio hardware can make use of Pluto SDR devices.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use soapysdr0.8-module-plutosdr because Pluto SDR device support for SoapySDR.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use soapysdr0.8-module-plutosdr as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair soapysdr0.8-module-plutosdr with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `soapysdr0.8-module-plutosdr --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
